case_title: KING SHIN KUNG et al VS. SAMUEL BALANCIO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUNG, KING SHIN KUNG, HELEN NG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALANCIO, SAMUEL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KUNG, KING SHIN KUNG, HELEN NG AS TO DEFENDANT BALANCIO, SAMUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-20-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BALANCIO, SAMUEL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, KING SHIN AS TO DEFENDANT BALANCIO, SAMUEL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BALANCIO, SAMUEL
